response.justification: Bogdan brings ~20 years of full-stack experience with a strong match on the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators). He demonstrates craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), polyglot proficiency (TS, Java, D, C++), and database/containerization experience (MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes). Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and PostgreSQL experience, but his depth and adaptability make him a strong interview candidate.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React full-stack background plus AI-agent/MCP tooling experience directly relevant to the role
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and active community teaching (workshops, dojos)
Polyglot engineer with backend depth (Java, D, C++, Python-adjacent) and DevOps familiarity (Docker, Kubernetes, GitLab CI)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest, which are listed in the primary stack
Database experience skews toward MongoDB/MySQL; PostgreSQL not called out
Cloud experience limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz; no GCP/Azure signals

key_factors.factor: Engineering craftsmanship and 20+ years of polyglot delivery
Missing explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and PostgreSQL signals
